qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the TRILLIUM OnDemand service?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for the TRILLIUM OnDemand service is https://ondemand.scinet.utoronto.ca.

qa_pairs.question: After starting an OnDemand desktop session, what is the next step to use Abaqus?
qa_pairs.answer: You need to open a new terminal window within your desktop and load the Abaqus module by typing: `module load abaqus/2026`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I start Abaqus in graphical mode if my node doesn't have a GPU or lacks VirtualGL support?
qa_pairs.answer: You should start the application using the `mesa` option: `abaqus cae -mesa`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I achieve better graphical performance with Abaqus in OnDemand if I have a GPU and VirtualGL support?
qa_pairs.answer: You should start Abaqus without the `-mesa` option: `abaqus cae`. When using the Nibi OnDemand desktop, ensure a full h100 (80GB) GPU is selected from the GPU pulldown.

qa_pairs.question: What is necessary to start Abaqus in GUI mode?
qa_pairs.answer: At least one unused CAE license must be available.

qa_pairs.question: How can I check the usage of CAE licenses for Abaqus?
qa_pairs.answer: You can check CAE license usage by running the command: `abaqus licensing lmstat -c $ABAQUSLM_LICENSE_FILE -a | grep "Users of cae"`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the JupyterHub links for starting a desktop session?
qa_pairs.answer: The JupyterHub links are: FIR (https://jupyterhub.fir.alliancecan.ca), NARVAL (https://portail.narval.calculquebec.ca/), and RORQUAL (https://jupyterhub.rorqual.alliancecan.ca).

qa_pairs.question: How do I load an Abaqus module in a JupyterLab desktop session?
qa_pairs.answer: You need to highlight an Abaqus module, such as `abaqus/2026`, in the 'Available Module' section on the left-hand side and click 'Load'.

qa_pairs.question: Once the Abaqus module is loaded in JupyterLab, how do I start Abaqus?
qa_pairs.answer: An 'Abaqus (VNC)' icon will appear on the desktop; click this icon to automatically start Abaqus in a remote Jupyter desktop.

qa_pairs.question: Is using VncViewer for Abaqus graphical applications still recommended?
qa_pairs.answer: No, this approach is considered obsolete; it is recommended to use the OnDemand or JupyterHub desktop instead.

qa_pairs.question: What is the renewal date for the SHARCNET Abaqus license?
qa_pairs.answer: The SHARCNET license has been renewed until January 17, 2027.

qa_pairs.question: What free resources does the SHARCNET license provide?
qa_pairs.answer: It provides a small shared free pool consisting of 3 CAE licenses and 54 execute tokens for all researchers.

qa_pairs.question: What are the maximum usage limits for the free SHARCNET Abaqus license?
qa_pairs.answer: Maximum usage limits are currently set at 1 CAE license per user, 10 tokens per user, and 15 tokens per group.

qa_pairs.question: What is the intended purpose of the free SHARCNET Abaqus tokens?
qa_pairs.answer: These free tokens are mainly intended for testing and light usage before users decide whether to purchase dedicated tokens.

qa_pairs.question: What were the approximate costs for dedicated Abaqus tokens in 2021?
qa_pairs.answer: In 2021, costs were approximately CAD$110 per compute token and CAD$400 per GUI token. To get an official quote, you should submit a ticket.

qa_pairs.question: Who is eligible to use the free SHARCNET Abaqus license?
qa_pairs.answer: Any registered Alliance researcher can use the free SHARCNET license.

qa_pairs.question: On what hardware can the free SHARCNET Abaqus license be used?
qa_pairs.answer: The free SHARCNET license can only be used on SHARCNET hardware, such as the SHARCNET OOD system or Nibi/Dusky clusters.

qa_pairs.question: What is required before an Alliance researcher can use the free SHARCNET Abaqus license?
qa_pairs.answer: Before using the license, you must contact technical support and request access, agreeing to the Academic License User Agreement.

qa_pairs.question: What information must be included in the email to technical support when requesting access to the SHARCNET Abaqus license?
qa_pairs.answer: You must mention that it is for use on SHARCNET systems and include a copy/paste of the 'License Agreement' statement with your full name and username entered in the indicated locations.

qa_pairs.question: Does every individual user in a group, including PIs, need to agree to the SHARCNET Abaqus Academic License User Agreement?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, every user must agree to it; it cannot be done once for a group, even for PIs who have purchased their own dedicated tokens.

qa_pairs.question: What are the specific conditions for using 'SIMULIA Academic Software' with tokens from the SHARCNET license server, as stated in the license agreement?
qa_pairs.answer: The software can only be used: 1) on SHARCNET hardware where it's installed, 2) in affiliation with a Canadian degree-granting academic institution, 3) for education, institutional, or instruction purposes (not commercial/contract-related where results aren't publishable), and 4) for experimental, theoretical, and/or digital research work to acquire new knowledge, up to the proof-of-concept stage in a laboratory.
